mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, quantity, production_date, expiry_days, description, created_at, updated_at FROM inventories
SELECT id, product_id, quantity, production_date, expiry_days, description, created_at, updated_at FROM inventories WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, product_id, quantity, production_date, expiry_days, description, created_at, updated_at FROM inventories WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventories (product_id, quantity, production_date, expiry_days, description) VALUES (#{productId}, #{quantity}, #{productionDate}, #{expiryDays}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventories SET product_id = #{productId}, quantity = #{quantity}, production_date = #{productionDate}, expiry_days = #{expiryDays}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, quantity, production_date, expiry_days, description, created_at, updated_at FROM inventories WHERE quantity <= #{threshold}

SELECT id, product_id, quantity, production_date, expiry_days, description, created_at, updated_at FROM inventories WHERE DATE_ADD(production_date, INTERVAL expiry_days DAY) <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)
